subject: Double charge on Pro plan
body: On April 20th I was charged twice for the Pro plan ($49 each). My card ends in 4241. Please refund the duplicate immediately. My registered email is jane.doe@example.com.

subject: OAuth login stuck on loading
body: Trying to sign in with Google keeps spinning. Tried Chrome and Safari. Contact me at 138****5678 (already masked by support).

subject: Unauthorized charge refund needed
body: I see a $99 charge I never authorized. Please refund or I will contact my bank. Phone: 555-0177, email sam@example.net.

subject: Setup guide is outdated
body: Your setup guide mentions v0.2 but the latest is v0.4. Maybe update the screenshots too.

subject: iOS app crashes on launch
body: After updating to 3.2.1 the app crashes immediately on iPhone 14. Same on iPad.

subject: Invoice download 404
body: Tried to download my April invoice three times, all 404. Tried logout/login. Same.

subject: Can you add Slack integration?
body: We'd love a native Slack webhook. Any ETA?

subject: Still waiting for refund from last week
body: Ticket T-10201 was supposed to be refunded within 5 business days but nothing appeared. Considering contacting my lawyer if not resolved by Friday.
